rules.format_notes: Pokemon Champions Regulation M-B: Mega Evolution IS legal (one Mega per battle) and is the format's core offensive mechanic - recommend it freely. Terastallization and Dynamax are NOT active. The game has a SMALL, CLOSED roster (~190-200 species, not the full Pokedex) - Paradox Pokemon, Legendaries, Mythicals, and many otherwise-ordinary Pokemon simply aren't in the game at all yet. If a read reports a species outside that roster, it's almost certainly a misidentification of a similar-looking legal Pokemon, not a real occurrence. Species Clause is also in effect - Mega Evolution is a transformation of an existing team member, not a second Pokemon; never count 'X' and 'X (Mega)' as two different picks. Coaching must respect: 2 active per side, bring 4 of 6, win by KOing all of the opponent's brought Pokemon. VERIFY/UPDATE this file when the regulation changes (see regulation_active_until) - the enforced allowlist lives in analyze_matches.py's ALLOWED_SPECIES.
